scenes.description: Performance of 'Triangle Dreamer' by FUWAMOCO with Subaru, Korone, Okayu, and Mio.
scenes.song_name: Triangle Dreamer (トライアングル・ドリーマー)

scenes.description: FUWAMOCO crowd surfing in giant bubbles while interacting with the audience.
MC segment where FUWAMOCO talk about the previous performance and the crowd surfing experience.
